# What prompted the action
You background check hullsey9889 and tinytheturtle249850 after they posted <:A_pinch:1432980538536493057>. 
From the check, you saw they both created discord acc on the same date (September) and joined this server on the same date (December).
You came to the conclusion that this needs moderation investigation under the charge of ban evasion. Then pinged crx. 
Should claim be true both accounts will banned. 

# Expected mod action 
1. Check the ip address of hullsey9889 and tinytheturtle249850 to see if it matches.
2. Check for other possibilities of alt account should they used some proxy to host bot.
3. Cross reference every banned user in the server to see if any of the ip matches.

Reason for crx ping only and not mod ping is to not disturb mod team. ~~Poor crx having to solo this investigation~~
